news.headline: BoE's Mann: The deceleration in prices might not quite get us to the 2% inflation target in the medium term.
Alkymi named one of '100 Most Innovative Fintech Startups' by CB Insights for AI-powered data automation in private markets.
news.summary: Alkymi, a company based in New York, was recently acknowledged for its success in utilizing artificial intelligence for automating data processes in private markets. On October 24, 2024, CB Insights included Alkymi in its prestigious Fintech 100 list, which features the top 100 promising companies in the field. This recognition highlights Alkymi's position as an end-to-end solution for data processing in private markets, solidifying its place among leading innovators in the industry.

news.headline: E Split Corp. (TSX: ENS) announces distribution for October 2024 to Class A shareholders.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, E Split Corp. (TSX: ENS) reported that a distribution for October 2024 will be paid to Class A shareholders. The exact amount of the distribution was not disclosed in the news release.

news.headline: Dimagi to present behavioral health access strategies at APHA 2024, sharing outcomes from work in Colorado.
news.summary: A public health technology partner based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, will be sharing updates on their efforts to enhance and update behavioral health services in Colorado. Dimagi, known for their work in public and community health technology, is scheduled to reveal progress and results from their continuous work in improving behavioral health access in the region. The discussion, set to take place on October 24, 2024, aims to showcase the outcomes and advancements achieved thus far in their BH initiatives.

news.headline: Market Force study reveals top fuel and c-store chains for best experience on road trips, includes clean bathrooms and quick bites.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Atlanta, a scenario unfolds where a person is on a lengthy road journey, running low on fuel with the gas light indicating the need to refuel, coupled with a feeling of hunger setting in. The individual decides to pull over in search of not just gasoline but also a pleasant experience - whether it's a fast meal or a tidy restroom facility. While some stops may go smoothly, providing the desired services, at other times, the experience may not be as seamless.

news.headline: Paragon Legal's Career Connect Program reaches third year with success, collaboration with two law schools.
news.summary: In San Francisco as of October 24, 2024, Paragon Legal shared news about the extension of its innovative Career Connect Program, which is successfully entering its third consecutive year. This initiative proudly maintains its partnership with Santa Clara University School of Law and William & Mary Law School, fostering valuable connections for participants.

news.headline: Ashling Partners named Celonis Partner of the Year in North America at Celosphere 2024 event in Munich. Celebrated for leadership in Intelligent Automation.
news.summary: In Munich on October 24, 2024, Ashling Partners was recognized as the Celonis Partner of the Year for North America at Celosphere 2024. This prestigious award highlights Ashling's expertise in Intelligent Automation and their significant impact on the industry. The accolade was presented at a global event, showcasing their leadership in the field.

news.headline: Trident Development of MN to launch 112-unit Plaza at Hazeltine in Chaska on October 30, featuring a unique breezeway.
news.summary: Trident Development, a Minnesota company known for luxury rental apartment acquisition and development, is preparing to launch a new property in Chaska. This four-story building will house 112 units and feature a distinctive breezeway alongside modern amenities. The official announcement is scheduled for October 24, 2024.

news.headline: BioAge Labs (Nasdaq: BIOA) CEO to present at Jefferies London Healthcare Conference - Nov 19–21, 2024.
news.summary: In Richmond, California, on October 24, 2024, BioAge Labs (Nasdaq: BIOA) revealed that Kristen Fortney, PhD, the CEO and co-founder, will be speaking at the Jefferies London Healthcare Conference from November 19 to 21, 2024. BioAge Labs is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company that focuses on developing therapeutic products for metabolic diseases by addressing human aging biology.

news.headline: Stride Tutoring and Michigan Virtual partner to provide high-impact tutoring in Michigan schools; aims to boost student success.
news.summary: The collaboration aims to enhance student achievement in Michigan by implementing effective tutoring strategies backed by research and evidence.

news.headline: T-Mobile's strong Q3 results beat estimates with $2.61 EPS and $20.16B revenue, prompting analysts to increase forecasts.
news.summary: T-Mobile US, Inc. posted strong third-quarter financial results, surpassing analyst expectations. Their earnings per share for the quarter were $2.61, higher than the estimated $2.41. Revenue for the quarter stood at $20.16 billion, also exceeding the estimated $20.01 billion and showing growth compared to the $19.25 billion in sales from the same period last year. Additionally, T-Mobile reported its best third-quarter postpaid phone net adds in ten years and record low third-quarter churn rate. As a result, the company raised its FY24 guidance.

news.headline: 1/3 of Canadian SMBs unaware of financial impact of cyberattacks; lack resources to mitigate damages.
news.summary: Recent findings by Okta indicate that Canadian small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) are greatly concerned about cyberattacks. However, a significant number of these SMBs are lacking the necessary resources and awareness to effectively address the potential financial and human consequences of such attacks. The study highlights that despite recognizing the threat posed by cybercrimes, many Canadian SMBs are not adequately prepared to handle them, emphasizing a need for increased cybersecurity education and resources in this sector.

news.headline: NeuroOne® Medical Technologies to showcase at 2024 ThinkEquity Conference, presenting cutting-edge innovations.
AMC Networks to announce Q3 2024 results on Nov 8 at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Press release to be issued before market opens.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, AMC Networks Inc. (NASDAQ: AMCX) announced that they will be holding a conference call on November 8, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss their third-quarter 2024 results. The company will release a press statement with the results before the market opens.

news.headline: DP World appoints senior leaders in the Americas - Philip Blumenthal as Senior Director of Ocean Freight and Peter Dyeremose as Senior Director of Air Freight. Commitment to growth.
news.summary: DP World, a prominent player in logistics and supply chain services, has enhanced its freight forwarding division in the Americas by hiring two key executives. Philip Blumenthal joins as Senior Director of Ocean Freight and Peter Dyeremose as Senior Director of Air Freight. These appointments signify DP World's dedication to expanding its freight forwarding services in the region. The company is focused on driving substantial growth in this sector.

Starbox introduces AI software to support 180 Degrees Brandcom in digital marketing, offering image, video, and live streaming services.
news.summary: Starbox Group Holdings Ltd. (Nasdaq: STBX), a leading provider of cash rebates, advertising, and payment solutions based in Malaysia, has recently announced its collaboration with 180 Degrees Brandcom Sdn Bhd (“180”). Starbox, the parent company owning 51% of 180, has begun supporting 180, a 4A advertising agency established in 2013. With over 20% of clients retained for more than 15 years, 180 specializes in digital marketing, advertising consulting, and design services. By leveraging the StarboxAI Pro Series software, 180 aims to enhance brand engagement through AI-powered solutions for image creation, video production, and live streaming, coupled with data-driven marketing strategies. This initiative is expected to boost service quality and overall brand performance for 180.

news.headline: NAYA Biosciences starts Phase 1/2a trial for GPC3-targeted NK Engager in hepatocellular carcinoma, enrolling patients in 7 centers.
news.summary: In Sarasota, Florida and Miami, on October 24, 2024, NAYA Biosciences, a life science company trading on the NASDAQ under the symbol NAYA, revealed an update on its clinical trial strategy. The organization obtained approval from the Israeli Ministry of Health in July 2024 and subsequent clearance from the institutional review board to commence patient enrollment in a maximum of 7 academic centers. This trial aims to assess the safety and effectiveness of NY-303, an NK Engager bispecific antibody targeting GPC3, as a standalone therapy for hepatocellular carcinoma in patients unresponsive to initial immunotherapy treatments.

Acuity to acquire QSC, expanding into cloud-manageable AV & control platform, broadening market reach.
news.summary: The market for Intelligent Spaces is growing, particularly in the realm of cloud-manageable audio, video, and control platforms. This expansion is opening up new opportunities with various applications. The market size for this sector is expanding significantly, with an increasing number of businesses and consumers adopting these technologies. With a wide range of potential uses, this market is expected to continue to grow in the near future.

news.summary: A major global technology company, HCLTech, has unveiled the launch of the HCLTech Climate Action Grant in the Americas program for the second time.

The Victory Bancorp, Inc. has announced 2024 third quarter earnings for The Victory Bank in Limerick, PA. OTCPX: VTYB.
news.summary: In Limerick, Pennsylvania, The Victory Bancorp, Inc. disclosed unaudited financial results for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024. The company, which is the parent entity of The Victory Bank, shared this information on October 24, 2024. The Victory Bancorp, Inc. is traded on the OTCQX under the ticker symbol VTYB.

news.headline: Connectbase has acquired Network Capacity Solutions to enhance its platform, expanding data center & service provider capability. #TechNews
news.summary: In Boston on October 24, 2024, Connectbase, a worldwide platform for connectivity transactions, revealed its acquisition of Network Capacity Solutions (NCS), an industry leader in data center and network inventory tools. This strategic move signifies an important step for Connectbase in expanding its capabilities and market presence.

news.headline: Jackson Healthcare named to 2024 Fortune Best Workplaces for Women list for 5th time, with 75% women employees and 91% job satisfaction.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Jackson Healthcare, a group of specialized healthcare staffing, search, and technology companies, has been included in the latest 2024 Fortune Best Workplaces for Women list, marking their fifth appearance. Shane Jackson, the president of Jackson Healthcare, highlighted that 75% of their workforce comprises women. The company received a 91% rating from employees, affirming it as a superior workplace.

Upland Software (Nasdaq: UPLD) to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7, 2024, followed by conference call at 4:00 pm CT.
news.summary: Upland Software, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPLD) based in Austin, Texas, declared that it will unveil its financial results for Q3 2024 post-market closure on Thursday, November 7, 2024. The subsequent conference call and webcast are scheduled for 4:00 p.m. CT / 5:00 p.m. ET. Interested individuals can join the call via a webcast on investor.uplandsoftware.com or by dialing toll-free numbers 1 (800) 715-9871 (for North American participants) or 1 (646) 307-1963.

news.headline: American Financial Resources, LLC chooses Polly for pricing strategies, borrower experience. Polly's technology aims to boost revenue, lower costs of origination. (Word count: 19, Characters: 106)
news.summary: In San Francisco, Polly, a top provider of advanced mortgage capital markets technology, recently announced American Financial Resources, LLC (AFR) as their newest client for their cloud-based technology and high-speed product and pricing engine (PPE). AFR chose Polly to aid in their aggressive growth goals, boost profits per loan, lower origination costs, all while prioritizing the borrower's journey. Company leaders highlight Polly's precise solutions as crucial in their decision-making process.

news.headline: Moat Metrics launches Innovation Alpha™, an AI-powered platform for investment decision-making, unveiling innovation behaviors.
news.summary: Moat Metrics, a renowned player in AI-driven innovation analytics, has unveiled a cutting-edge platform named Innovation Alpha™ in New York. This revolutionary tool aims to transform investment strategies by utilizing advanced artificial intelligence to uncover a company's proven innovative activities in product development and market engagement. Through Innovation Alpha™, investors, corporate executives, and stakeholders can access unparalleled insights into a company's authentic innovative capabilities. This initiative marks a pivotal moment in investment decision-making and promises to provide invaluable information to users.

news.headline: Zero Carbon Academy Awards in London honored innovators in clean technology revolution in 2024.
news.summary: A press release from Zero Carbon Academy in London announces the recipients of the 2024 Cleantech Awards, honoring the top innovators contributing to the clean technology movement.

news.headline: Savvy Advisors expands with addition of Wealth Managers Craig Austad and Eric Passin to affiliate RIA, Savvy Wealth.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, it was revealed that Craig Austad and Eric S. Passin have joined Savvy Wealth's RIA affiliate, Savvy Advisors, as wealth managers. This new addition showcases the company's commitment to expanding its team with experienced professionals. Austad and Passin bring a wealth of knowledge and expertise to their roles, further enhancing the services provided by Savvy Advisors. This move is expected to bolster the company's capabilities to cater to a wider range of clients and increase its overall assets under management.

news.headline: Kingston Technology launching CUDIMM modules for Intel 800-Series Chipset in California.
news.summary: In Fountain Valley, California, Kingston Technology is set to launch CUDIMM modules specially designed for the Intel 800-Series Chipset. This move aims to cater to the growing demand for high-performance memory solutions in the market. The modules are expected to provide increased speed and efficiency for users, enhancing their computing experience. This strategic release aligns with Kingston's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: Inovedis Inc. treats first U.S. patients with SINEFIX™ Rotator Cuff Repair System, a new milestone for the company.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Inovedis Inc., an innovative medical technology startup, achieved a significant accomplishment in soft tissue repair by treating the first U.S. patients with their groundbreaking SINEFIX™ Rotator Cuff Repair System. This milestone signifies a major advancement in the field of medical technology and marks the beginning of a new era in soft tissue repair.

news.headline: Wealth.com partners with Independent Advisor Alliance to provide 225 advisors across 27 states with advanced estate planning resources.
news.summary: Wealth.com, a top estate planning platform, has partnered with Independent Advisor Alliance (IAA), a prominent hybrid firm, to offer advanced digital estate planning resources to IAA's 225 advisors in 27 states. This partnership aims to empower financial advisors to enhance their practice as independent business owners. Through this collaboration, advisors will have access to cutting-edge tools to improve their services and grow their businesses.

Central Bark® achieved significant growth and higher revenues in Q3 2024, marking its 20th year in business. MILWAUKEE, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Milwaukee, October 24, 2024 - Central Bark®, a leading whole dog care franchise and industry trailblazer, has marked its 20th year in business with a surge in revenues and consistent expansion. The company has navigated a period of remarkable growth and transformation, further solidifying its position as an industry leader. The steady progress has resulted in significant financial gains, with revenue figures soaring and reaching milestone numbers. This success has been attributed to the brand's innovative approach and unwavering commitment to excellence in pet care services.

news.headline: Tripadvisor to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 6, 2024; available on ir.tripadvisor.com after market close.
news.summary: Tripadvisor, Inc., headquartered in Needham, Massachusetts, revealed in a press release today that they will be releasing their financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on Wednesday, November 6. The report will be available on the company's investor relations website at ir.tripadvisor.com. Tripadvisor is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TRIP. Investors and stakeholders can access the information after the market closes on that day.

news.headline: Safe and Green Development Corporation (Nasdaq: SGD) regains compliance with Nasdaq listing standards on Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: In Miami on October 24, 2024, Safe and Green Development Corporation (Nasdaq: SGD) disclosed receiving official communication from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC, indicating the Company has regained compliance with Nasdaq's minimum requirements. The Company, operating under the ticker symbol SGD, expressed satisfaction with this development.

news.headline: EpiVax and CUBRC awarded $2M FDA contract to develop control peptides for generic peptide drugs.
news.summary: EpiVax, Inc. and CUBRC, Inc. have revealed a recent development as they have secured a notable contract from the Office of Generic Drugs (OGD) under the FDA. The awarded contract, valued at $2 million, spans a two-year period and is identified under contract number #75F40124C00094. The purpose of this agreement is centered around the joint efforts of EpiVax and CUBRC in a significant project to enhance...

news.headline: Oka unveils global lineslip with Lloyd's Syndicates Apollo & Hiscox for Article 6 insurance solution. World's first policy for voluntary carbon credits traded into compliance.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Park City, Utah and London on October 24, 2024, Oka, known as The Carbon Insurance Company™, introduced a lineslip for their innovative Article 6 insurance product, Corresponding Adjustment Protect™. This marks the launch of the initial policy designed for voluntary carbon credits exchanged to meet regulatory requirements. This development represents a significant milestone in the industry as Oka continues to lead the way in offering solutions for carbon credit insurance.

news.headline: Benzinga announces finalists for 2024 Global Fintech Awards; 10th annual event to be held in NYC.
news.summary: In New York on October 24, 2024, Benzinga, a top financial media platform catering to next-generation investors, revealed the nominees for its 10th Benzinga Global Fintech Awards. The event will be held at the prestigious Convene Brookfield Place in New York City.

news.headline: Thomas Dorsey acquires stake in Pelican Air Services, boosting international expansion plans. Bordeaux, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Pelican Air Services' international expansion reaches a significant milestone in Bordeaux, France, with the announcement on Oct. 24, 2024. The company, renowned for its expertise in wine logistics, celebrates the appointment of Thomas Dorsey, the founder of Dorsey, Wright & Associates, as a crucial step in their growth strategy.
